#  Add Observations to a Drawing (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the project's Drawings tool.  
AND
    * 'Standard' or 'Admin' permissions on the project's Observations tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This action can be performed in offline mode if the drawing has already been downloaded to the device. Tasks performed in offline mode will be synced with Procore once a network connection has been reestablished.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
  2. Tap the drawing to which you want to add an observation.
  3. Tap the **Pin**
  4. Tap the **Observation** ![Icon Drawing Markup Observation Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/41caf1c9cd9f464eb32b61308d3ea9f9/70995ff59417ba0e2d5063a7e1207855/icon-drawing-markup-observation-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.  
![Drawings Android Add Observation To Drawing](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5751ba4a9a6dc432a4a402a2868c3d0f/7b2ed13ff2fae5eedbef9f620e94e98b/drawings-android-add-observation-to-drawing.png?fm=webp)
  5. Drop an observation item pin on the drawing by tapping the area where you want the item to appear.
  6. Choose from the following options:
     * **Create New Observation** :
       1. Choose from an existing template or select **Create Observation without a Template.**
       2. Enter the desired information. For a list of fields and See [Create an Observation (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/observations-android/tutorials/create-an-observation-android)
       3. Tap **Save**.
     * **Link Existing Observation** :
       1. Tap **Link Existing**.
       2. Tap the observation you want to link.
  7. To publish, select the hand icon, tap the observation pin, and tap **Publish**. See [What is the difference between personal and published drawing markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)


## See Also
  * [Mark up a Drawing (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-android)
  * [Drawings (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/permissions)
  * [Link Items to a Drawing (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/link-items-to-a-drawing-android)
title: Add Observations to a Drawing (Android)
description: How to add observation items to a drawing in the Drawings tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
